technical_score.description: Evaluates the agent's technical knowledge and ability to accurately diagnose and resolve the issue.

scoring.1-3: Failed to understand the issue, provided incorrect information, or could not resolve a basic technical problem.
scoring.4-6: Understood the basic issue but required significant time or multiple attempts to find a solution. Provided mostly accurate but incomplete technical advice.
scoring.7-8: Accurately diagnosed the issue and provided correct technical steps, resolving the problem efficiently.
scoring.9-10: Demonstrated exceptional technical expertise, resolved the issue quickly, and proactively checked for other potential technical problems.

professionalism_score.description: Evaluates the agent's professional demeanor, respectfulness, and representation of the company.

scoring.1-3: Unprofessional, rude, or dismissive. Used inappropriate language or tone.
scoring.4-6: Generally polite but lacked formal professionalism. May have sounded bored or distracted.
scoring.7-8: Maintained a professional, courteous, and respectful demeanor throughout the call.
scoring.9-10: Extremely professional, built excellent rapport, and positively reinforced the company's brand.

communication_score.description: Evaluates the clarity, conciseness, and effectiveness of the agent's communication.

scoring.1-3: Unclear, confusing, or used excessive jargon that the customer did not understand.
scoring.4-6: Adequate communication but sometimes rambling or slightly difficult to follow.
scoring.7-8: Clear, concise, and easy to understand. Used appropriate language for the customer's level of knowledge.
scoring.9-10: Exceptional communication. Anticipated customer confusion and explained complex concepts simply and effectively.

process_adherence_score.description: Evaluates whether the agent followed required company processes, security checks, and policies.

scoring.1-3: Ignored critical security checks (like account verification) or flagrantly violated company policy.
scoring.4-6: Followed some processes but missed minor steps or took incorrect shortcuts.
scoring.7-8: Followed all required processes and policies, including proper verification and documentation.
scoring.9-10: Flawlessly executed all processes and went above and beyond to ensure full compliance and accurate record-keeping.

soft_skills_score.description: Evaluates the agent's empathy, active listening, and ability to handle customer emotions.

scoring.1-3: Lacked empathy, ignored customer frustration, or interrupted frequently.
scoring.4-6: Listened but responded mechanically. Showed minimal empathy for the customer's situation.
scoring.7-8: Demonstrated empathy, actively listened, and effectively de-escalated mild frustration.
scoring.9-10: Exceptional empathy and active listening. Successfully turned a highly negative customer experience into a positive one through emotional intelligence.
